overview: This program is designed for an intermediate lifter aiming to cut body fat while maintaining muscle mass. The program follows a Push/Pull/Legs split with 5 training days per week. The focus is on moderate volume with a mix of compound and isolation exercises, utilizing a double progression model. Cardio is included to aid in fat loss. The plan includes distinct phases: Accumulation, Intensification, Deload, and Peak, each with specific volume and intensity adjustments.
progression_rules: Utilize double progression: aim to hit the top of the rep range for all sets before increasing weight. Maintain RPE 6-8 with RIR 2-4 on compounds and RPE 6-8 with RIR 1-3 on isolation exercises. During deload, halve the volume and reduce RPE by 2 points.

exercises.name: Seated Dumbbell Shoulder Press
form_cues: Press overhead in line with ears

days.notes: Focus on maintaining form and control throughout each movement.
Ensure full range of motion on all back exercises.
Focus on controlled movements and muscle activation.
